productDisplayName: Esprit Men Pure Vitality Brown Steel Watches
description: Taking traditional designs and giving it modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. This classic Pure Vitality analog wrist watch from esprit is no exception. Contemporary and trendy, it& rsquo s an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Case diameter: 28 mm Case thickness: 8.5 mm Dial shape: Rectangle Matt finish stainless steel case with horizontal grooves and a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Leather strap with reptile embossing and a matt finish tang clasp with branding Durable, scratch-resistant mineral crystal glass White textured dial with black accents, branding below 12 o& rsquo clock position and lines denoting hour markings Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time Solid case back in stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it when washing hands or your car
